text.title: Router Shadow Deploy — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: cheap-router candidate routed unexpectedly to expensive leg; cost guardrail blocked promotion.

example.title: Cost-spike caught by shadow
example.code:
shadow-report.yaml: candidate_id: router-v2-rc1 baseline_router_id: router-v1 window_start: 2026-04-15 window_end: 2026-04-22 # 7 days judge: model: claude-sonnet-4-5 prompt_version: judge-v3 sme_agreement: 0.89 # passes calibration gate
metrics: scoring_delta_median: -0.012 # candidate 0.012 lower — within ±0.02 contract band scoring_delta_95ci: [-0.018, -0.006] cost_delta_mean: 1.34 # candidate costs 1.34x baseline — FAIL (gate <= 1.10) schema_parity_min_daily: 1.00 # 100% — PASS
gate_evaluation: scoring_gate: PASS cost_gate: FAIL # 1.34 > 1.10 schema_gate: PASS decision: NO-GO
root_cause_analysis: finding: "candidate router classified 31% of routine queries as 'complex' and sent them to gpt-4-turbo instead of gpt-4o-mini" fix: "tighten router classifier threshold from 0.6 → 0.75; re-run shadow"
example.note: Demonstrates r3-cost-guardrail catching a router-class failure that classic A/B (which measures only quality + latency) would have missed. Cost regression silent in product metrics but blocking on the cost gate.

example.title: Clean promotion after fix
example.code: shadow-report.yaml v2: candidate_id: router-v2-rc2 window: 2026-04-25 → 2026-05-02 (7 days) metrics: scoring_delta_median: -0.008 cost_delta_mean: 0.97 # cheaper than baseline schema_parity_min_daily: 1.00 gate_evaluation: {scoring: PASS, cost: PASS, schema: PASS} decision: GO rollout_plan: 1% → 10% → 50% → 100% over 5 days
example.note: After fixing the classifier threshold, all three gates pass. Rollout proceeds with the gradual percentage plan from step 5.
